ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
python_min:
- '3.10'

about.description:
This is an updated version of the ndb client library for use with Google Cloud Datastore.
Client Library Documentation - https://googleapis.dev/python/python-ndb/latest
Product Documentation - https://cloud.google.com/datastore/docs
The original Python 2 version of ndb was designed specifically for the Google App Engine python27 runtime and can be found at https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/datastore-ndb-python.
This version of ndb is designed for the Google App Engine Python 3 runtime, and will run on other Python platforms as well.
about.summary: NDB library for Google Cloud Datastore

about.description:
This is an updated version of the ndb client library for use with Google Cloud Datastore.
Client Library Documentation - https://googleapis.dev/python/python-ndb/latest
Product Documentation - https://cloud.google.com/datastore/docs
The original Python 2 version of ndb was designed specifically for the Google App Engine python27 runtime and can be found at https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/datastore-ndb-python.
This version of ndb is designed for the Google App Engine Python 3 runtime, and will run on other Python platforms as well.
about.summary: NDB library for Google Cloud Datastore

name: google-cloud-ndb
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "google-cloud-ndb" %}
{% set version = "2.4.2" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/{{ name[0] }}/{{ name }}/google_cloud_ndb-{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 44e64e25a15f168ddff0f8c5a7288f7b0256ec51737948388df58b0ddc22586f

build:
  noarch: python
  script: {{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation
  number: 1

requirements:
  host:
    - python {{ python_min }}
    - pip
    - setuptools
  run:
    - python >={{ python_min }}
    - google-api-core >=2.11.0,<3.0.0
    - google-cloud-datastore >=2.16.0,!=2.20.2,<3.0.0
    - protobuf >=4.25.8,<8.0.0
    - pymemcache >=2.1.0,<5.0.0
    - pytz >=2018.3
    - redis-py >=3.0.0,<8.0.0

test:
  imports:
    - google
  commands:
    - pip check
  requires:
    - pip
    - python {{ python_min }}

about:
  home: https://pypi.org/project/google-cloud-ndb
  dev_url: https://github.com/googleapis/google-cloud-python/tree/main/packages/google-cloud-ndb
  doc_url: https://googleapis.dev/python/python-ndb/latest/
  description: |
    This is an updated version of the ndb client library for use with Google Cloud Datastore.
    Client Library Documentation - https://googleapis.dev/python/python-ndb/latest
    Product Documentation - https://cloud.google.com/datastore/docs
    The original Python 2 version of ndb was designed specifically for the Google App Engine python27 runtime and can be found at https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/datastore-ndb-python.
    This version of ndb is designed for the Google App Engine Python 3 runtime, and will run on other Python platforms as well.
  summary: NDB library for Google Cloud Datastore
  license: Apache-2.0
  license_file: LICENSE

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - rxm7706
